channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DepEd and DOLE to deploy 240,000 TUPAD workers for school preparation under Brigada Eskwela 2026
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) and the Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) are set to mobilize around 240,000 beneficiaries of the Tulong Panghanapbuhay sa Ating Disadvantaged/Displaced Wor...

item.title: Everyman cinema faces challenges as it aims to stabilise and grow
item.description: Everyman, the UK-based luxury cinema chain, is facing a period of financial and operational difficulty after years of growth and acclaim. Known for its plush seating and gourmet offerings, including p...

item.title: Graham Platner Faces Scrutiny Over Explicit Texts Revealed by Wife
item.description: Democratic U.S. Senate candidate Graham Platner of Maine is facing increased scrutiny after reports revealed that his wife, Amy Gertner, discovered sexually explicit text messages on his phone. Accord...

item.title: Cleophas Malala announces 2027 Kakamega gubernatorial bid after 2022 election defeat
item.description: Cleophas Malala, the deputy leader of the Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP), has officially declared his intention to contest the Kakamega gubernatorial seat in the 2027 general elections. Speaki...

item.title: CBS defends replacing Stephen Colbert with Byron Allen despite poor ratings
item.description: CBS recently replaced Stephen Colbert's long-running 'The Late Show' with Byron Allen's 'Comics Unleashed,' a move the network claims was financially strategic. CBS stated that switching to a 'time bu...

item.title: Overview of Tanzanians Arrested Abroad for Drug Trafficking in 2025
item.description: In 2025, Tanzania saw 28 of its citizens arrested in different countries for involvement in drug trafficking, with Zambia recording the highest number of arrests at 20. Other countries included Botswa...

item.title: Liverpool dismiss Arne Slot after second-season decline and target Andoni Iraola as successor
item.description: Liverpool have dismissed head coach Arne Slot after two seasons in charge, despite his earlier success in delivering the club’s 20th league title in his debut campaign. The decision follows a disappoi...

item.title: Kanye West cleared to perform in the Netherlands despite previous European show cancellations
item.description: Kanye West, who now goes by Ye, has had two of his concerts in the Netherlands confirmed despite widespread cancellations of his European shows following his controversial anti-Semitic remarks. The ra...

item.title: Raul Fernandez wins Italian MotoGP sprint as Jorge Martin sets Mugello speed record
item.description: Spain's Raul Fernandez delivered a stunning performance in Saturday's MotoGP sprint at Mugello, clinching a surprise victory over former world champion Jorge Martin. Riding for the Aprilia-Trackhouse ...

item.title: Yoga Helps Improve Mood, Fatigue, and Sleep in Cancer Survivors, Study Finds
item.description: A recent clinical trial suggests that cancer survivors can experience significant physical and emotional benefits through a structured yoga program. The study, published by the American Society of Cli...

item.title: Political strategist warns Trump is losing influence and facing growing opposition within GOP
item.description: Steve Schmidt, a Republican strategist known for managing John McCain's 2008 presidential campaign, has issued a stark assessment of former President Donald Trump's political standing. In his recent S...

item.title: Multi-storey building collapses near Saket Metro Station in Delhi; rescue operations underway
item.description: A multi-storey building collapsed on Saturday evening near the Saket Metro Station in the Saidulajab area of South Delhi, triggering a large-scale rescue operation. According to Delhi Fire Services (D...

item.title: Government Allocates 1.39 Trillion Shillings to Support Fee-Free Basic Education
item.description: Tanzania government has set aside over 1.39 trillion shillings across three financial years to support its fee-free basic education programme. Majority of this fund, about 906.69 billion shillings, go...

item.title: Stormers overpower Cardiff with dominant forward display led by Ntuthuko Mchunu
item.description: The Stormers produced a commanding 44-21 victory over Cardiff at Cape Town Stadium in their United Rugby Championship quarterfinal, with loosehead prop Ntuthuko Mchunu delivering a standout, man-of-th...

item.title: Alleged extortion network member tells tribunal he was unaware of friend's links to shootings
item.description: An Immigration and Refugee Board hearing in Canada heard testimony from Jashandeep Singh, an alleged member or associate of a cross-country extortion network linked to the Lawrence Bishnoi gang. Singh...

item.title: Krugersdorp couple escalate year-long family prank war with car sticker and mock billboard campaign
item.description: A Gauteng couple's ongoing prank battle has attracted attention after a series of increasingly elaborate practical jokes culminated in a planned mock billboard campaign in Krugersdorp. Chandré and Rae...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens environmental protection through reforms, clean energy push, and tree-planting drive
item.description: Tanzania is making strong steps to improve environmental protection through a wide range of reforms, clean energy programmes, and large-scale reforestation efforts aimed at tackling climate change and...

item.title: Considering a Self-Managed Super Fund: Costs, Risks and Alternatives
item.description: Following recent tax changes in Australia, there’s been renewed interest in self-managed super funds (SMSFs) due to the favourable tax treatment compared to other investment options. SMSFs offer great...

item.title: NDC officially endorses Peter Obi as its presidential candidate for 2027 elections
item.description: The Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) has officially ratified former Labour Party presidential candidate, Peter Obi, as its flag bearer for the 2027 general elections following nationwide primary elec...

item.title: Old unexploded mortar shell recovered and safely neutralised in Poonch park
item.description: An old mortar shell was discovered in a public park near the Sher-i-Kashmir Bridge on the outskirts of Poonch in Jammu and Kashmir. The incident occurred when a local youth, who was out for a morning ...
